race.comment: BONUS SEASON (7) finally broke the maiden status at Sandown last time around and will have taken a bunch of confidence from that breakthrough victory. Looks the runner in this field with the most upside and can go back-to-back without surprising. CANTARITO (9) saves her best form for this mile trip and is drawn to get a cosy run in transit from the inside marble. Great chance to take this out. KADESKY (4) is one from one around this circuit and will be ready to peak at the fourth run back. Top-three credentials on best figures. HIGHGROVE ROSE (3) resumes here but has shown enough in previous preparations to warrant serious consideration in a race like this. Keep very safe while fresh. CANARA (12) doesn't win out of turn but is usually thereabouts and can trouble the judge with any luck in running.
